Interface MetadataMappingOrBuilder

All Superinterfaces:
com.google.protobuf.MessageLiteOrBuilder, com.google.protobuf.MessageOrBuilder
All Known Implementing Classes:
MetadataMapping, MetadataMapping.Builder
public interface MetadataMappingOrBuilder extends com.google.protobuf.MessageOrBuilder

    • getResourceTypeValue

      int getResourceTypeValue()
      The Kubernetes resource to read the value from.
      .centraldogma.xds.k8s.v1.MetadataMapping.ResourceType resource_type = 1 [(.google.api.field_behavior) = REQUIRED];
      Returns:
      The enum numeric value on the wire for resourceType.

    • getResourceType

      MetadataMapping.ResourceType getResourceType()
      The Kubernetes resource to read the value from.
      .centraldogma.xds.k8s.v1.MetadataMapping.ResourceType resource_type = 1 [(.google.api.field_behavior) = REQUIRED];
      Returns:
      The resourceType.

    • getEntryTypeValue

      int getEntryTypeValue()
      Whether the value is read from a label or an annotation.
      .centraldogma.xds.k8s.v1.MetadataMapping.EntryType entry_type = 2 [(.google.api.field_behavior) = REQUIRED];
      Returns:
      The enum numeric value on the wire for entryType.

    • getEntryType

      MetadataMapping.EntryType getEntryType()
      Whether the value is read from a label or an annotation.
      .centraldogma.xds.k8s.v1.MetadataMapping.EntryType entry_type = 2 [(.google.api.field_behavior) = REQUIRED];
      Returns:
      The entryType.

    • hasSourceKey

      boolean hasSourceKey()
      Copies the value of this single label/annotation key,
e.g. "topology.kubernetes.io/zone".
      string source_key = 3;
      Returns:
      Whether the sourceKey field is set.

    • getSourceKey

      String getSourceKey()
      Copies the value of this single label/annotation key,
e.g. "topology.kubernetes.io/zone".
      string source_key = 3;
      Returns:
      The sourceKey.

    • getSourceKeyBytes

      com.google.protobuf.ByteString getSourceKeyBytes()
      Copies the value of this single label/annotation key,
e.g. "topology.kubernetes.io/zone".
      string source_key = 3;
      Returns:
      The bytes for sourceKey.

    • hasSourceKeyPrefix

      boolean hasSourceKeyPrefix()
      Copies the value of every label/annotation key that starts with this
prefix, e.g. "topology.kubernetes.io/". The original keys are preserved
as the metadata keys.
      string source_key_prefix = 4;
      Returns:
      Whether the sourceKeyPrefix field is set.

    • getSourceKeyPrefix

      String getSourceKeyPrefix()
      Copies the value of every label/annotation key that starts with this
prefix, e.g. "topology.kubernetes.io/". The original keys are preserved
as the metadata keys.
      string source_key_prefix = 4;
      Returns:
      The sourceKeyPrefix.

    • getSourceKeyPrefixBytes

      com.google.protobuf.ByteString getSourceKeyPrefixBytes()
      Copies the value of every label/annotation key that starts with this
prefix, e.g. "topology.kubernetes.io/". The original keys are preserved
as the metadata keys.
      string source_key_prefix = 4;
      Returns:
      The bytes for sourceKeyPrefix.

    • getMetadataNamespace

      String getMetadataNamespace()
      The Envoy filter_metadata namespace to store the value under. Defaults to
"envoy.lb" when empty.
      string metadata_namespace = 5 [(.google.api.field_behavior) = OPTIONAL];
      Returns:
      The metadataNamespace.

    • getMetadataNamespaceBytes

      com.google.protobuf.ByteString getMetadataNamespaceBytes()
      The Envoy filter_metadata namespace to store the value under. Defaults to
"envoy.lb" when empty.
      string metadata_namespace = 5 [(.google.api.field_behavior) = OPTIONAL];
      Returns:
      The bytes for metadataNamespace.

    • getMetadataKey

      String getMetadataKey()
      The metadata key to store the value under. Defaults to source_key when
empty. Ignored in source_key_prefix mode where the original keys are kept.
      string metadata_key = 6 [(.google.api.field_behavior) = OPTIONAL];
      Returns:
      The metadataKey.

    • getMetadataKeyBytes

      com.google.protobuf.ByteString getMetadataKeyBytes()
      The metadata key to store the value under. Defaults to source_key when
empty. Ignored in source_key_prefix mode where the original keys are kept.
      string metadata_key = 6 [(.google.api.field_behavior) = OPTIONAL];
      Returns:
      The bytes for metadataKey.
